inputs.text: RAW photo of a stunning Korean woman with burgundy red fluffy wolf cut, fox-like sharp eyes and slim elegant face, sitting at a rooftop cafe during golden hour. She wears a champagne satin slip dress that catches the warm light. Shot on 85mm f/1.4 with creamy bokeh, centered symmetrical composition. Silhouette against the golden sun behind her, overcast soft diffused light wrapping around her features. Ultra realistic skin texture, flawless porcelain complexion with dewy highlight on cheekbones. Sophisticated smoky eye makeup, nude glossy lips. She tilts her chin slightly upward with a poised, regal expression. City skyline dissolves into warm amber haze behind her. Window light quality, editorial fashion photography, no text, no watermarks.
